args.code:
import pandas as pd
opportunities_data = locals()['var_function-call-9812860162497345308']
df_opportunities = pd.DataFrame(opportunities_data)
df_opportunities = df_opportunities.dropna(subset=['ContractID__c'])
contract_ids = df_opportunities['ContractID__c'].tolist()
# Clean contract_ids from leading '#' and trailing whitespace
contract_ids = [cid.lstrip("#").strip() for cid in contract_ids]
print("__RESULT__:")
print(pd.Series(contract_ids).to_json(orient='records'))

args.code:
import pandas as pd
from datetime import datetime

opportunities_data = locals()['var_function-call-9812860162497345308']
contracts_data = locals()['var_function-call-6601455789112690407']

df_opportunities = pd.DataFrame(opportunities_data)
df_contracts = pd.DataFrame(contracts_data)

# Clean IDs for merging
df_opportunities['Id'] = df_opportunities['Id'].apply(lambda x: str(x).lstrip("#").strip())
df_opportunities['OwnerId'] = df_opportunities['OwnerId'].apply(lambda x: str(x).lstrip("#").strip())
df_opportunities['ContractID__c'] = df_opportunities['ContractID__c'].apply(lambda x: str(x).lstrip("#").strip() if pd.notna(x) else x)
df_contracts['Id'] = df_contracts['Id'].apply(lambda x: str(x).lstrip("#").strip())

# Merge dataframes
df_merged = pd.merge(df_opportunities, df_contracts, left_on='ContractID__c', right_on='Id', how='inner', suffixes=('_opp', '_contract'))

# Convert date columns to datetime objects
df_merged['CreatedDate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_merged['CreatedDate']).dt.date
df_merged['CompanySignedDate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_merged['CompanySignedDate']).dt.date

# Calculate turnaround time in days
df_merged['TurnaroundDays'] = (df_merged['CompanySignedDate'] - df_merged['CreatedDate']).dt.days

# Group by OwnerId and calculate the average turnaround time
average_turnaround = df_merged.groupby('OwnerId')['TurnaroundDays'].mean().reset_index()

# Find the agent with the quickest (minimum) average turnaround time
quickest_agent = average_turnaround.loc[average_turnaround['TurnaroundDays'].idxmin()]

print("__RESULT__:")
print(quickest_agent['OwnerId'].to_json())

import pandas as pd
from datetime import datetime

opportunities_data = locals()['var_function-call-9812860162497345308']
contracts_data = locals()['var_function-call-6601455789112690407']

df_opportunities = pd.DataFrame(opportunities_data)
df_contracts = pd.DataFrame(contracts_data)

# Clean IDs for merging
df_opportunities['Id'] = df_opportunities['Id'].apply(lambda x: str(x).lstrip("#").strip())
df_opportunities['OwnerId'] = df_opportunities['OwnerId'].apply(lambda x: str(x).lstrip("#").strip())
df_opportunities['ContractID__c'] = df_opportunities['ContractID__c'].apply(lambda x: str(x).lstrip("#").strip() if pd.notna(x) else x)
df_contracts['Id'] = df_contracts['Id'].apply(lambda x: str(x).lstrip("#").strip())

# Merge dataframes
df_merged = pd.merge(df_opportunities, df_contracts, left_on='ContractID__c', right_on='Id', how='inner', suffixes=('_opp', '_contract'))

# Convert date columns to datetime objects without .dt.date to maintain datetime properties
df_merged['CreatedDate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_merged['CreatedDate'])
df_merged['CompanySignedDate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_merged['CompanySignedDate'])

# Calculate turnaround time in days
df_merged['TurnaroundDays'] = (df_merged['CompanySignedDate'] - df_merged['CreatedDate']).dt.days

# Group by OwnerId and calculate the average turnaround time
average_turnaround = df_merged.groupby('OwnerId')['TurnaroundDays'].mean().reset_index()

# Find the agent with the quickest (minimum) average turnaround time
quickest_agent = average_turnaround.loc[average_turnaround['TurnaroundDays'].idxmin()]

print("__RESULT__:")
print(quickest_agent['OwnerId'].to_json())

import pandas as pd
from datetime import datetime

opportunities_data = locals()['var_function-call-9812860162497345308']
contracts_data = locals()['var_function-call-6601455789112690407']

df_opportunities = pd.DataFrame(opportunities_data)
df_contracts = pd.DataFrame(contracts_data)

# Clean IDs for merging
df_opportunities['Id'] = df_opportunities['Id'].apply(lambda x: str(x).lstrip("#").strip())
df_opportunities['OwnerId'] = df_opportunities['OwnerId'].apply(lambda x: str(x).lstrip("#").strip())
df_opportunities['ContractID__c'] = df_opportunities['ContractID__c'].apply(lambda x: str(x).lstrip("#").strip() if pd.notna(x) else x)
df_contracts['Id'] = df_contracts['Id'].apply(lambda x: str(x).lstrip("#").strip())

# Merge dataframes
df_merged = pd.merge(df_opportunities, df_contracts, left_on='ContractID__c', right_on='Id', how='inner', suffixes=('_opp', '_contract'))

# Convert date columns to datetime objects without .dt.date to maintain datetime properties
df_merged['CreatedDate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_merged['CreatedDate'])
df_merged['CompanySignedDate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_merged['CompanySignedDate'])

# Calculate turnaround time in days
df_merged['TurnaroundDays'] = (df_merged['CompanySignedDate'] - df_merged['CreatedDate']).dt.days

# Group by OwnerId and calculate the average turnaround time
average_turnaround = df_merged.groupby('OwnerId')['TurnaroundDays'].mean().reset_index()

# Find the agent with the quickest (minimum) average turnaround time

args.code:
import pandas as pd

opportunities_data = locals()['var_function-call-9812860162497345308']
contracts_data = locals()['var_function-call-6601455789112690407']

df_opportunities = pd.DataFrame(opportunities_data)
df_contracts = pd.DataFrame(contracts_data)

# Clean IDs for merging
df_opportunities['Id'] = df_opportunities['Id'].str.lstrip("#").str.strip()
df_opportunities['OwnerId'] = df_opportunities['OwnerId'].str.lstrip("#").str.strip()
df_opportunities['ContractID__c'] = df_opportunities['ContractID__c'].astype(str).str.lstrip("#").str.strip()
df_contracts['Id'] = df_contracts['Id'].str.lstrip("#").str.strip()

# Merge dataframes on cleaned ContractID__c and Id
df_merged = pd.merge(df_opportunities, df_contracts, left_on='ContractID__c', right_on='Id', how='inner', suffixes=('_opp', '_contract'))

# Convert date columns to datetime objects and remove timezone information
df_merged['CreatedDate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_merged['CreatedDate']).dt.tz_localize(None)
df_merged['CompanySignedDate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_merged['CompanySignedDate']).dt.tz_localize(None)

# Calculate turnaround time in days
df_merged['TurnaroundDays'] = (df_merged['CompanySignedDate'] - df_merged['CreatedDate']).dt.days

# Group by OwnerId and calculate the average turnaround time
average_turnaround = df_merged.groupby('OwnerId')['TurnaroundDays'].mean().reset_index()

# Find the agent with the quickest (minimum) average turnaround time
quickest_agent_id = average_turnaround.loc[average_turnaround['TurnaroundDays'].idxmin()]['OwnerId']

print("__RESULT__:")
print(quickest_agent_id)

import pandas as pd

opportunities_data = locals()['var_function-call-9812860162497345308']
contracts_data = locals()['var_function-call-6601455789112690407']

df_opportunities = pd.DataFrame(opportunities_data)
df_contracts = pd.DataFrame(contracts_data)

# Clean IDs for merging
df_opportunities['Id'] = df_opportunities['Id'].str.lstrip("#").str.strip()
df_opportunities['OwnerId'] = df_opportunities['OwnerId'].str.lstrip("#").str.strip()
df_opportunities['ContractID__c'] = df_opportunities['ContractID__c'].astype(str).str.lstrip("#").str.strip()
df_contracts['Id'] = df_contracts['Id'].str.lstrip("#").str.strip()

# Merge dataframes on cleaned ContractID__c and Id
df_merged = pd.merge(df_opportunities, df_contracts, left_on='ContractID__c', right_on='Id', how='inner', suffixes=('_opp', '_contract'))

# Convert date columns to datetime objects and remove timezone information
df_merged['CreatedDate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_merged['CreatedDate']).dt.tz_localize(None)
df_merged['CompanySignedDate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_merged['CompanySignedDate']).dt.tz_localize(None)

# Calculate turnaround time in days
df_merged['TurnaroundDays'] = (df_merged['CompanySignedDate'] - df_merged['CreatedDate']).dt.days

# Group by OwnerId and calculate the average turnaround time
average_turnaround = df_merged.groupby('OwnerId')['TurnaroundDays'].mean().reset_index()

# Find the agent with the quickest (minimum) average turnaround time
quickest_agent_id = average_turnaround.loc[average_turnaround['TurnaroundDays'].idxmin()]['OwnerId']

print("__RESULT__:")
print(quickest_agent_id)
